arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB parameter group.

description.description: A description of the MemoryDB parameter group.

family.description: The name of the MemoryDB parameter group family.

id.description: The ID of the MemoryDB parameter group.

parameter.description: A set of parameters in the MemoryDB parameter group, each with a name and value.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MemoryDB parameter group.
